title: Alliance Marketing Manager
raw_jd:
Your Impact


Own your opportunity to be at the center of GDIT’s business operations. Make an impact by collaborating across functions to make mission success achievable.


Job Description


GDIT is looking for a strategic marketing professional to join the growing GDIT corporate marketing team. As the Alliances Marketing Manager, you will be responsible for identifying, managing, and enhancing strategic relationships with key technology partners in the GDIT ecosystem. You will oversee and execute the strategic and tactical development, delivery and measurement of alliance marketing campaigns for GDIT. In this role, you will collaborate with a creative marketing team, technical subject matter experts, and the wider CTO and Growth organization to create best\-in\-class marketing programs.


This is an exciting opportunity to contribute to the go\-to\-market strategy and day\-to\-day marketing direction with our key alliance partners. The candidate will oversee the development of integrated partner marketing campaigns that help position the business for success. This includes maintaining close working relationships with Technology leadership and Growth/Business Development directors to ensure alignment of marketing efforts with Alliance business activities.


\*\* This position requires Hybrid to Falls Church, Virginia office 3 days per week


HOW YOU WILL MAKE AN IMPACT:


Some of things you will be doing…


* Building consultative relationships with subject matter experts, business development/growth and operational teams and GDIT’s extensive technology partner ecosystem
* Developing partnership strategies through the identification of shared business interests and the creation of engagement plans that are mapped to business opportunities
* Consulting with external marketing vendors as well as media partners in support of co\- marketing campaigns
* Establishing and maintaining strong relationships with key decision makers at partner companies through regular communication and engagement
* Negotiating co\-marketing agreements that align with business priorities and enterprise objectives
* Overseeing the execution of partnership activities, including event planning, customer\-facing workshops, editorial articles, webinars, sponsorships, advertising, etc.
* Monitor partnership performance against key metrics, providing regular updates to stakeholders and identifying opportunities for optimization.
* Proactively identify opportunities for strategic partners to join enterprise marketing campaigns
* Working effectively within a large matrixed organization


Who you are…


* Strategic thinker who can synthesize information from various sources to create an actionable point of view. Ability to translate strategic plans into actionable execution.
* Energy and creativity. Energy and enthusiasm are your hallmarks. You are a self\-starter and can juggle multiple priorities.
* A leader. Ability to influence, lead and coach across functional teams, a champion for new ideas and concepts. Proven ability to build relationships and influence decision making at senior levels.
* Business savvy. You understand how to connect marketing action to business outcomes. You understand how to strategically manage and invest budget.
* Team Player. Strong team player with a track record of cross\-functional collaboration.
* Experienced in Business\-to\-Business/ Business\-to\-Government Marketing/Technology Marketing, as well as creative problem\-solving and negotiation skills.
* Expertise. You have experience with alliance partner marketing and executing campaigns in the technology sector.


WHAT YOU’LL NEED TO SUCCEED:  

Bring your initiative and drive for innovation to GDIT. The Alliance Marketing Manager must have:  

* Education: Bachelor's degree required
* Experience: 8\+ years of combined marketing, corporate communications, brand management, and/or public relations agency experience (OR 6\+ years with Master's degree)
* Role requirements:
* Knowledge of US Federal Government IT industry services, systems, and products marketplace and related media.
* Experience in cross\-channel marketing communications (PR, events, digital and social media) and partner marketing
* Strong and highly effective writing and public speaking skills and interpersonal communication skills.
* Writing samples available upon request

* Location: Hybrid to Falls Church, Virginia office with the expectation of working in the office three (3\) days per week


Why join the team?

* Join an award winning marketing team
* Collaborate with leading technology brands
* Lead high\-impact and creative marketing programs
* Autonomy to execute creative marketing initiatives
* Opportunity for career growth and potential management responsibilities
* Flexible working arrangements
* The ability to influence major initiatives


GDIT IS YOUR PLACE  

At GDIT, the mission is our purpose, and our people are at the center of everything we do.  

* Growth: AI\-powered career tool that identifies career steps and learning opportunities
* Support: An internal mobility team focused on helping you achieve your career goals
* Rewards: Comprehensive benefits and wellness packages, 401K with company match, and competitive pay and paid time off
* Flexibility: Full\-flex work week to own your priorities at work and at home
* Community: Award\-winning culture of innovation and a military\-friendly workplace

  

OWN YOUR OPPORTUNITY  

Explore a career at GDIT and you’ll find endless opportunities to grow alongside colleagues who share your sense of ownership and pride in the meaningful work we do.
Work Requirements


Years of Experience
6 \+ years of related experience* may vary based on technical training, certification(s), *or* degree

Certification
Travel Required
Less than 10%
Salary and Benefit Information


The likely salary range for this position is $107,744 \- $130,065\. This is not, however, a guarantee of compensation or salary. Rather, salary will be set based on experience, geographic location and possibly contractual requirements and could fall outside of this range.  

View information about benefits and our total rewards program.
About Our Work


We are GDIT. A global technology and professional services company that delivers technology and mission services to every major agency across the U.S. government, defense and intelligence community. Our 30,000 experts extract the power of technology to create immediate value and deliver solutions at the edge of innovation. We operate across over 50 countries worldwide, offering leading capabilities in digital modernization, AI/ML, cloud, cyber and application development. Together with our customers, we strive to create a safer, smarter world by harnessing the power of deep expertise and advanced technology.
Join our Talent Community to stay up to date on our career opportunities and events at gdit.com/tc.*Equal Opportunity Employer / Individuals with Disabilities / Protected Veterans*

score.skills_rationale: This is a marketing role requiring partnership marketing, B2B/B2G marketing experience, and cross-channel marketing communications. The candidate's background is entirely in data analytics, BI architecture, and technical systems with no marketing experience.
score.scope_rationale: The role requires 8+ years of marketing experience and managing strategic partnerships at a senior level. While the candidate has senior-level experience, it's in a completely different domain (data/analytics vs marketing).
score.pay_rationale: Salary range of $107K-$130K is significantly below the candidate's W2 target range of $160K-$220K.
red_flags: Requires hybrid work in Falls Church, VA 3 days per week
score.raw_analysis: This is a marketing role requiring extensive partnership marketing and communications experience, which the candidate completely lacks. The candidate's entire background is in data analytics, BI architecture, and technical systems. The salary is also well below target range and requires hybrid presence in Falls Church. This is a complete domain mismatch.
